Query:
UNLOAD (SELECT upgrade.upgrade, count(*) AS change 
FROM (SELECT * 
FROM comstock_amy2018_r2_2025_md_by_state_and_county_parquet 
WHERE comstock_amy2018_r2_2025_md_by_state_and_county_parquet.upgrade != 0) AS upgrade JOIN (SELECT * 
FROM comstock_amy2018_r2_2025_md_by_state_and_county_parquet 
WHERE comstock_amy2018_r2_2025_md_by_state_and_county_parquet.upgrade = 0) AS baseline ON baseline.bldg_id = upgrade.bldg_id AND baseline."in.nhgis_tract_gisjoin" = upgrade."in.nhgis_tract_gisjoin" AND baseline.state = upgrade.state 
WHERE baseline.applicability = true AND upgrade.applicability = true AND coalesce(baseline."out.electricity.total.energy_consumption..kwh" - upgrade."out.electricity.total.energy_consumption..kwh", -1) < 0.001 AND coalesce(baseline."out.natural_gas.total.energy_consumption..kwh" - upgrade."out.natural_gas.total.energy_consumption..kwh", -1) < 0.001 AND coalesce(baseline."out.other_fuel.total.energy_consumption..kwh" - upgrade."out.other_fuel.total.energy_consumption..kwh", -1) < 0.001 AND coalesce(baseline."out.district_cooling.total.energy_consumption..kwh" - upgrade."out.district_cooling.total.energy_consumption..kwh", -1) < 0.001 AND coalesce(baseline."out.district_heating.total.energy_consumption..kwh" - upgrade."out.district_heating.total.energy_consumption..kwh", -1) < 0.001 AND NOT (coalesce(abs(upgrade."out.electricity.total.energy_consumption..kwh" - baseline."out.electricity.total.energy_consumption..kwh"), 0) < 0.001 AND coalesce(abs(upgrade."out.natural_gas.total.energy_consumption..kwh" - baseline."out.natural_gas.total.energy_consumption..kwh"), 0) < 0.001 AND coalesce(abs(upgrade."out.other_fuel.total.energy_consumption..kwh" - baseline."out.other_fuel.total.energy_consumption..kwh"), 0) < 0.001 AND coalesce(abs(upgrade."out.district_cooling.total.energy_consumption..kwh" - baseline."out.district_cooling.total.energy_consumption..kwh"), 0) < 0.001 AND coalesce(abs(upgrade."out.district_heating.total.energy_consumption..kwh" - baseline."out.district_heating.total.energy_consumption..kwh"), 0) < 0.001) GROUP BY 1 ORDER BY 1) 
 TO 's3://resstock-core/bsq_athena_unload_results/4222f3b56c23359311d2ca0c0725f287e9569921df691f2b1d6228441002c3f5/45040467-1af8-44ee-bc73-d241c7c83e79/' 
 WITH (format = 'PARQUET')
